scripts.build:wasm: cd crates/brookmd-core && RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=nightly CARGO_UNSTABLE_BUILD_STD=std,panic_abort RUSTFLAGS='-Zunstable-options -Cpanic=immediate-abort -C link-arg=-zstack-size=262144' wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir ../../packages/brookmd/src/wasm && rm -f ../../packages/brookmd/src/wasm/.gitignore ../../packages/brookmd/src/wasm/package.json
scripts.build:wasm:stable: cd crates/brookmd-core && RUSTFLAGS='-C link-arg=-zstack-size=262144' wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir ../../packages/brookmd/src/wasm && rm -f ../../packages/brookmd/src/wasm/.gitignore ../../packages/brookmd/src/wasm/package.json
scripts.test:spec: cd crates/brookmd-core && CMARK_MIN_PASS=652 cargo test --release --test cmark_spec -- --nocapture
scripts.test:gfm: cd crates/brookmd-core && GFM_MIN_PASS=24 cargo test --release --test gfm_spec -- --nocapture
scripts.deploy: bun run build:wasm && bun run build:web && sudo rm -rf /var/www/md.hsingh.app/* && sudo cp -r web/dist/. /var/www/md.hsingh.app/ && sudo chown -R caddy:caddy /var/www/md.hsingh.app && echo deployed
